title: CreditScoringDataset
description: Schema for the credit scoring federated learning dataset. Used by the daemon to validate training data before each round (Requirement 19.2).

features.name: debt_to_income_ratio
features.description: Total monthly debt payments divided by gross monthly income

features.name: credit_utilization
features.description: Fraction of available revolving credit currently used (0.0-1.0)

features.name: num_open_accounts
features.description: Number of currently open credit accounts

features.name: num_delinquencies_2yr
features.description: Number of 30+ day delinquencies in the past 2 years

features.name: earliest_credit_line_months
features.description: Months since the earliest credit line was opened

features.name: num_hard_inquiries
features.description: Number of hard credit inquiries in the past 12 months

features.name: total_credit_limit
features.description: Total revolving credit limit in USD (normalized)

features.name: employment_length_months
features.description: Length of current employment in months (null if unemployed)

label.name: default_within_2yr
label.description: Binary default label: 1 = defaulted within 2 years, 0 = did not default
